commands: vite update testnpm2 && cat package.json packages/utils/package.json # should update all testnpm2 versions
vite update testnpm2 --latest --filter app && cat packages/app/package.json # should update in specific package
vite up -D --filter app && cat packages/app/package.json # should update dev dependencies in app
vite update --filter "*" && cat packages/app/package.json packages/utils/package.json # should update in all packages
vite update -r --no-save && cat package.json packages/app/package.json # should update recursively without saving
vite update --workspace --filter app @vite-plus-test/utils && cat packages/app/package.json # should update workspace dependency
